/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvision_msgs_custom__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libvision_msgs_custom__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/vision_msgs_custom__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/vision_msgs_custom/msg/detection2_d_extended__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vision_msgs_custom__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/vision_msgs_custom/msg/object_distance__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libvision_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
